message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{\"A\": {\"B\": 0, \"C\": 2}, \"B\": {}, \"C\": {}, \"D\": {\"E\": 1}, \"E\": {}, \"F\": {}}","[[\"A\",\"B\",5],[\"A\",\"B\",-5],[\"D\",\"E\",-2],[\"B\",\"C\",3],[\"F\",\"A\",1]]"],"focus":"Multiple adjustments for same edge that sum to zero (should leave pre-existing zero edge intact), removal when aggregated delta makes final <= 0 (D->E), adding new edges and nodes (B->C, F->A), and ensuring deterministic ordering."},{"input_lines":["{\"A\": {\"B\": 1}, \"B\": {}}","[[\"B\",\"B\",-1]]"],"focus":"Self-loop appears in user_adjustments (B->B); function must detect self-loop and return {} immediately."},{"input_lines":["{\"B\": {\"C\": 3}, \"A\": {\"B\": 1}, \"C\": {}}","[[\"AA\",\"B\",2],[\"A\",\"B\",-1]]"],"focus":"Multi-letter node names to exercise lexicographic ordering (A, AA, B, C). Edge A->B becomes zero due to non-zero delta and must be removed; new node AA with edge AA->B must be added."}]}
